metadata.audit: PB-025 generates a validation report and generated PR body proving all required sections are populated and all forbidden placeholders are absent.
metadata.impact: Generated PR bodies become deterministic, complete, and fail-closed when required governance fields are missing.
metadata.policy_link: AGENTS.md branch governance, fail-closed validation, human oversight, and audit-first engineering requirements.
metadata.purpose: Eliminate unresolved governance template placeholders from generated PB pull request bodies before PR creation.
metadata.risk: Unresolved template placeholders can create audit ambiguity, hide missing governance information, or allow incomplete release metadata into review.

title: PB-025 VERIFIED: Governance PR Template Completion
